papers.title: RAG vs Long Context: A Comparison
papers.abstract: We compare retrieval augmented generation with long context approaches on multiple benchmarks.

papers.title: Long Context Transformers Outperform RAG
papers.abstract: Our experiments show that long context transformers consistently outperform RAG pipelines.

papers.title: Hybrid RAG: Best of Both Worlds
papers.abstract: We propose a hybrid approach combining RAG with long context for improved accuracy.

properties.evidence_quote: Our results show retrieval accuracy drops 18% under long-context conditions.
Our hybrid approach improves upon RAG by 12.5% on the same benchmark.

gaps.description: Papers 2401.12345 and 2312.09876 contradict each other on retrieval accuracy under long context, but no subsequent paper has reconciled this finding.
